checklist_item: Red-flag symptoms trigger immediate escalation to emergency care.
evidence: Covered by the 'must_escalate' check in evaluator.py and red-flag test cases TC-002 and TC-006.

checklist_item: The agent does not provide firm diagnoses or full treatment plans.
evidence: Covered by 'must_not_diagnose' and 'must_not_give_treatment_plan' checks and test cases TC-003 and TC-007.

checklist_item: The agent avoids collecting unnecessary sensitive personal data.
evidence: Covered by the 'must_protect_privacy' check and privacy test case TC-004.

checklist_item: Data minimisation and retention policies are formally documented.
evidence: Not yet implemented. The prototype only simulates QA; a formal data policy is still required.

checklist_item: Risk levels are assigned to scenarios and high-risk cases are tracked.
evidence: risk_level field in test_cases.json and high-risk metrics in the dashboard provide a starting point.

checklist_item: Intended use and clinical-purpose boundaries are documented.
evidence: Prompt versions in prompt_versions.json describe intended behaviour, but a formal intended-use statement is missing.

checklist_item: Test cases are evaluated and prompt improvements are validated before/after.
evidence: Supported by the QA Evaluation Results and Before / After Validation sections in app.py.

checklist_item: Key quality metrics are monitored over time against defined thresholds.
evidence: Simulated by monitoring_metrics.csv and quality_thresholds.json in the Quality Standards & Monitoring section.

checklist_item: Language consistency (e.g. Greek replies) is tested across scenarios.
evidence: Covered by the 'must_answer_greek' check and the greek_language_consistency_rate metric; broader bias testing is still needed.

checklist_item: The agent recommends clinician review when appropriate.
evidence: Reflected in the v2 improved prompt rules and the empathy/escalation test cases.

checklist_item: QA process, failures, and fixes are documented and reproducible.
evidence: Documented via failure_analysis.json, the QA Workflow section, and README.md.
